main_story: Keep the first four pages focused on monthly monitoring, management control, and KPI review.
secondary_appendix: Treat the appendix page as a continuation layer, not the lead report story.

pages.goal: Highlight the monthly management story with headline KPIs, alert counts, and the largest adverse deviations.
Compare plan and actual throughput, grade, recovery, copper production, and unit cost with explicit variance logic.
Explain deviations using metallurgical and operating drivers such as grade, recovery, availability, and utilization.
Track unit cost, operating cost, revenue proxy, EBITDA proxy, and cash-burden movements.
Keep scenario comparison, benchmark transparency, Monte Carlo, tornado, and heatmap analysis as a clearly secondary appendix.
